summary.notes: Shape-semantic rerun only. SVGs were not edited. Current batch11 candidates and regenerated triad renders were used for the four repaired shape-rerun rows.
summary.selected_from: standard_source_table rows where helm_candidate.candidate_status == repaired_pending_shape_rerun and helm_candidate.source_batch == catalog/owned_repair_batch11.json

verdicts.expected_shape: barrel buoy body with semantic_brief required colours red and black.
verdicts.judge_comments: The batch11 repair resolves the previous missing-colour failure. Although the provider reference is a black outline witness, the current semantic_brief requires red and black load-bearing colours, and the candidate now carries both without changing the barrel buoy family.
verdicts.observed_shape: Barrel buoy body with black outline and stem; body is split red over black.
verdicts.required_change: No shape-semantic repair required; continue to visual parity/final approval if needed.

verdicts.expected_shape: can/cylindrical buoy body with semantic_brief required colours green and black.
verdicts.judge_comments: The repaired candidate preserves the can family and now includes both required load-bearing colours. It does not collapse into a conical/nun buoy and has no invented topmark.
verdicts.observed_shape: Can/cylindrical buoy body with black outline and stem; body is split green over black.
verdicts.required_change: No shape-semantic repair required; continue to visual parity/final approval if needed.

verdicts.expected_shape: can/cylindrical buoy body with required orange colour.
verdicts.judge_comments: The batch11 candidate fixes the previous yellow/orange colour error while preserving the can silhouette and black outline/stem.
verdicts.observed_shape: Can/cylindrical buoy body with black outline and stem; body is filled orange.
verdicts.required_change: No shape-semantic repair required; continue to visual parity/final approval if needed.

verdicts.expected_shape: conical/nun buoy body with semantic_brief required colours red and black.
verdicts.judge_comments: The batch11 repair resolves the previous missing-colour failure. Although the provider reference is a black outline witness, the current semantic_brief requires red and black load-bearing colours, and the candidate now carries both without changing the conical/nun buoy family.
verdicts.observed_shape: Conical/nun buoy body with black outline and stem; body is split red over black.
verdicts.required_change: No shape-semantic repair required; continue to visual parity/final approval if needed.
